https://code.claude.com/docs/en/platform.description: Choose where to run Claude Code and what to connect it to. Compare the CLI, Desktop, VS Code, JetBrains, web, mobile, and integrations like Chrome, Slack, and CI/CD.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugin-d.title: Constrain plugin dependency versions
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugin-d.description: Declare version constraints on plugin dependencies so your plugin keeps working when an upstream plugin ships a breaking change.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugin-h.title: Recommend your plugin from your CLI
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugin-h.description: Emit a one-line marker from your CLI so Claude Code prompts users to install your official plugin.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugin-m.title: Create and distribute a plugin marketplace
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugin-m.description: Build and host plugin marketplaces to distribute Claude Code extensions across teams and communities.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugin-r.title: Recommend plugins for your org
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugin-r.description: Add a relevance block to marketplace plugin entries so Claude Code suggests them when a user's work matches.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins..title: Create plugins
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins..description: Create custom plugins to extend Claude Code with skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins-.title: Plugins reference
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins-.description: Complete technical reference for Claude Code plugin system, including schemas, CLI commands, and component specifications.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/prompt-c.title: How Claude Code uses prompt caching
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/prompt-c.description: Claude Code manages prompt caching automatically. See why a model switch triggers a slow uncached turn, what `/compact` costs, why CLAUDE.md edits don't apply mid-session, and how to check your cache hit rate.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/prompt-c.category: トラブルシューティング

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/prompt-l.title: Prompt library
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/prompt-l.description: Copy-paste prompts for Claude Code, tagged by task and role.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/remote-c.title: Continue local sessions from any device with Remote Control
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/remote-c.description: Continue a local Claude Code session from your phone, tablet, or any browser using Remote Control. Works with claude.ai/code and the Claude mobile app.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/remote-c.category: セッションとワークフロー

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/routines.title: Automate work with routines
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/routines.description: Put Claude Code on autopilot. Define routines that run on a schedule, trigger on API calls, or react to GitHub events from Anthropic-managed cloud infrastructure.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sandbox-.title: Choose a sandbox environment
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sandbox-.description: Compare Claude Code sandbox options: the built-in sandboxed Bash tool, sandbox runtime, dev containers, Docker, and VMs. Choose the right isolation for your threat model.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sandbox-.category: セキュリティとコンプライアンス

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sandboxi.title: Configure the sandboxed Bash tool
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sandboxi.description: Learn how Claude Code's sandboxed Bash tool provides filesystem and network isolation for safer, more autonomous agent execution.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sandboxi.category: セキュリティとコンプライアンス

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/schedule.title: Run prompts on a schedule
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/schedule.description: Use /loop and the cron scheduling tools to run prompts repeatedly, poll for status, or set one-time reminders within a Claude Code session.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/schedule.category: セッションとワークフロー

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/security.title: Security
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/security.description: Learn about Claude Code's security safeguards and best practices for safe usage.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/security.category: セキュリティとコンプライアンス

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/security.title: Catch security issues as Claude writes code
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/security.description: Install the security-guidance plugin to have Claude review its own code changes for vulnerabilities and fix them in the same session.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/security.category: セキュリティとコンプライアンス

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/server-m.title: Configure server-managed settings
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/server-m.description: Centrally configure Claude Code for your organization through server-delivered settings, without requiring device management infrastructure.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sessions.title: Manage sessions
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sessions.description: Name, resume, branch, and switch between Claude Code conversations. Covers `--continue`, `--resume`, `--from-pr`, the `/resume` picker, session naming, and where transcripts are stored.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sessions.category: セッションとワークフロー

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings.title: Claude Code settings
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings.description: Configure Claude Code with global and project-level settings, and environment variables.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/setup.md.title: Advanced setup
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/setup.md.description: System requirements, platform-specific installation, version management, and uninstallation for Claude Code.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/skills.m.title: Extend Claude with skills
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/skills.m.description: Create, manage, and share skills to extend Claude's capabilities in Claude Code. Includes custom commands and bundled skills.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/slack.md.title: Claude Code in Slack
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/slack.md.description: Delegate coding tasks directly from your Slack workspace
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/slack.md.category: コラボレーションとチームワーク

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/statusli.title: Customize your status line
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/statusli.description: Configure a custom status bar to monitor context window usage, costs, and git status in Claude Code

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sub-agen.title: Create custom subagents
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sub-agen.description: Create and use specialized AI subagents in Claude Code for task-specific workflows and improved context management.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/terminal.title: Configure your terminal for Claude Code
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/terminal.description: Fix Shift+Enter for newlines, get a terminal bell when Claude finishes, configure tmux, match the color theme, and enable Vim mode in the Claude Code CLI.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/third-pa.title: Enterprise deployment overview
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/third-pa.description: Learn how Claude Code can integrate with various third-party services and infrastructure to meet enterprise deployment requirements.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/tools-re.title: Tools reference
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/tools-re.description: Complete reference for the tools Claude Code can use, including permission requirements and per-tool behavior.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/troubles.title: Troubleshoot installation and login
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/troubles.description: Fix command not found, PATH, permission, network, and authentication errors when installing or signing in to Claude Code.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/troubles.category: トラブルシューティング

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/troubles.title: Troubleshooting
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/troubles.description: Fix high CPU or memory usage, hangs, auto-compact thrashing, and search problems in Claude Code, and find the right page for other issues.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/troubles.category: トラブルシューティング

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/ultrapla.title: Plan in the cloud with ultraplan
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/ultrapla.description: Start a plan from your CLI, draft it on Claude Code on the web, then execute it remotely or back in your terminal
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/ultrapla.category: セッションとワークフロー

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/ultrarev.title: Find bugs with ultrareview
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/ultrarev.description: Run a deep, multi-agent code review in the cloud with /code-review ultra to find and verify bugs before you merge.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/voice-di.title: Voice dictation
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/voice-di.description: Speak your prompts in the Claude Code CLI with hold-to-record or tap-to-record voice dictation.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/vs-code..title: Use Claude Code in VS Code
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/vs-code..description: Install and configure the Claude Code extension for VS Code. Get AI coding assistance with inline diffs, @-mentions, plan review, and keyboard shortcuts.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/web-quic.title: Get started with Claude Code on the web
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/web-quic.description: Run Claude Code in the cloud from your browser or phone. Connect a GitHub repository, submit a task, and review the PR without local setup.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.title: Week 13 · March 23–27, 2026
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.description: Auto mode for hands-off permissions, computer use built in, PR auto-fix in the cloud, transcript search, and a PowerShell tool for Windows.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.category: リリースノートとアップデート

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.title: Week 14 · March 30 – April 3, 2026
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.description: Computer use in the CLI, interactive in-product lessons, flicker-free rendering, per-tool MCP result-size overrides, and plugin executables on PATH.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.category: リリースノートとアップデート

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.title: Week 15 · April 6–10, 2026
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.description: Ultraplan cloud planning, the Monitor tool with self-pacing /loop, /team-onboarding for packaging your setup, and /autofix-pr from your terminal.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.category: リリースノートとアップデート

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.title: Week 16 · April 13–17, 2026
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.description: Claude Opus 4.7 with the new xhigh effort level, Routines on Claude Code on the web, mobile push notifications that ping your phone when Claude needs you, a /usage breakdown that shows what's driving your limits, and native binaries replacing the bundled JavaScript.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.category: リリースノートとアップデート

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.title: Week 17 · April 20–24, 2026
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.description: /ultrareview opens as a research preview, automatic session recaps when you return to a terminal, custom color themes you can build and ship in plugins, and a redesigned Claude Code on the web.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.category: リリースノートとアップデート

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.title: Week 18 · April 27 – May 1, 2026
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.description: Claude Code on Windows runs without Git Bash, claude auth login accepts a pasted OAuth code when the browser callback can't reach localhost, claude project purge cleans up local state per project, and pasting a PR URL into /resume finds the session that created it.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.category: リリースノートとアップデート

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.title: Week 19 · May 4–8, 2026
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.description: Load plugins from .zip archives and URLs, search command history across every project with Ctrl+R, branch new worktrees from local HEAD or the remote default, and block actions unconditionally with auto mode hard deny rules.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.category: リリースノートとアップデート

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.title: Week 20 · May 11–15, 2026
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.description: Manage every Claude Code session from one screen with agent view, keep Claude working toward a goal until a condition holds, and run fast mode on Opus 4.7 by default.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.category: リリースノートとアップデート

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.title: Week 21 · May 18–22, 2026
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.description: Use auto mode on the Pro plan and with Sonnet 4.6, see which skills, subagents, and MCP servers drive your plan limits in /usage, and review diffs with the new /code-review command.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.category: リリースノートとアップデート

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.title: Week 22 · May 25–29, 2026
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.description: Run Claude Code on Claude Opus 4.8, orchestrate large tasks with dynamic workflows, catch security issues with the security-guidance plugin, and use fast mode on Opus 4.8 at a lower price.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.category: リリースノートとアップデート

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.title: Week 23 · June 1–5, 2026
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.description: Run auto mode on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry, prompt before writing files that can run code in acceptEdits mode, list installed plugins with /plugin list, and require an approved version range for managed deployments.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.category: リリースノートとアップデート

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.title: Week 24 · June 8–12, 2026
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.description: Move a session to a new directory with /cd, let subagents spawn their own subagents, and troubleshoot a broken configuration with safe mode.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.category: リリースノートとアップデート

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.title: What's new
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.description: A weekly digest of notable Claude Code features, with code snippets, demos, and context on why they matter.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/whats-ne.category: リリースノートとアップデート

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/workflow.title: Orchestrate subagents at scale with dynamic workflows
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/workflow.description: Dynamic workflows orchestrate many subagents from a script Claude writes and you can rerun. Use them for codebase audits, large migrations, and cross-checked research.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/worktree.title: Run parallel sessions with worktrees
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/worktree.description: Isolate parallel Claude Code sessions in separate git worktrees so changes don't collide. Covers the `--worktree` flag, subagent isolation, `.worktreeinclude`, cleanup, and non-git VCS hooks.

https://code.claude.com/docs/en/zero-dat.title: Zero data retention
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/zero-dat.description: Learn about Zero Data Retention (ZDR) for Claude Code, available to qualified accounts on Claude for Enterprise, including scope, disabled features, and how to request enablement.
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/zero-dat.category: セキュリティとコンプライアンス
